_publications._publicationTitle: Frequent EGFR Positivity and Overexpression in High-Grade Areas of Human MPNSTs.

_contextSnippet: we confirmed that EGFR-positive areas segregate with high-grade features...and in two cases also with P53-positive areas
resourceName: P53 (DO-7, Novocastra, Newcastle upon Tyne, UK, final dilution 1/50)
details: Detected P53-positive areas that colocalized with EGFR-positive regions in 2 out of 4 cases with available serial sections
